chapter_title.ar: باب فَضْلِ الْمَسْجِدِ الْأَعْظَمِ بِالْكُوفَةِ وَ فَضْلِ الصَّلَاةِ فِيهِ وَ الْمَوَاضِعِ الْمَحْبُوبَةِ فِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 102 – The merit of the Grand Masjid of Al-Kufa, and the merit of the Salāt performed therein, and the beloved places in it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/489)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/489)
text: الْأُسْطُوَانَةُ السَّابِعَةُ مِمَّا يَلِي أَبْوَابَ كِنْدَةَ فِي الصَّحْنِ مَقَامُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) وَ الْخَامِسَةُ مَقَامُ جَبْرَئِيلَ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl, from Ibn Asbaat, raising it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The seventh pillar is from what follows the doors of Kinda in the courtyard, being a place of Ibrahim<sup>as</sup>, and the fifth place of Jibraeel<sup>as</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Sahl from ibn Asbat in a marfu‘ manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the seventh pillar counting from Kindah doors in the compound is the station of Ibrahim and the fifth is the station of Jibril (Gabriel), Allah has granted him peace.”
